narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 2-A (precinct in Ross County) has 843 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.8%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.6 percentage points.
